name: @canvas/interaction
description: The interaction layer for the canvas notes app. Framework- and DOM-agnostic: camera (screen↔page), spatial index / hit-test, selection, drag mechanics, and a tool state machine — all driving gestures/commands into @canvas/core's Editor. The only DOM-touching file is input.ts's bindDom adapter; everything else is unit-testable in Node. Borrows OSS only at the primitive level behind swappable interfaces (SpatialIndex → rbush is the documented drop-in).
